sections.heading: Who We Are
body: Rizvi Fashions Limited is a 100% export-oriented knit composite and ready-made garment manufacturer, established in 2013. Within years of its founding, the company achieved full compliance with international labour and environmental standards — a milestone that continues to define the manner in which it conducts itself.

The facility is itself a statement of intent: a self-sufficient campus with its own power supply, dormitory, medical centre, workshop, mosque, and water infrastructure, secured by a walled perimeter and a trained security team. It is an infrastructure conceived for independent, consistent operation at scale — and for permanence.

items.title: Technology
items.text: Product development at Rizvi Fashions is driven by CAD-CAM technology, ensuring consistent quality at every price point. Its management carries an equal fluency in the demands of Western markets and the dynamics of Eastern production — closing the distance between what international buyers require and what the factory floor delivers.

items.title: Scale
items.text: With 2,631 modern machines, a workforce of 5,120 professionals, and a monthly output of 5.0 to 5.5 million pieces, the company manufactures at a scale that justifies confidence. Prospective partners are warmly invited to visit the facility and observe its operations at first hand.

items.title: Range
items.text: The product range spans trousers, jerseys, T-shirts, polo shirts, hoodies, sweatshirts, shorts, lingerie, babywear, and underwear — the full spectrum of contemporary knitwear.

body: Rizvi Fashions Limited is a member of the Bangladesh Garment Manufacturers and Exporters Association (BGMEA).
